title: Happy Sugar Life
sourceNotes: Single season, 12 episodes. Manga complete at 62 chapters. The anime follows the manga closely but compresses pacing (roughly 1 chapter per episode early on, 3-4 chapters per episode by the finale) and skips Chapters 28-31 (Shio's parents backstory); ep. 12 ends at Chapter 48, leaving the manga's ending (Chapters 49-62) unadapted.
